evals.prompt: I just cloned the GSP_API repo. Can you set up the development environment with all dependencies and configure the pre-commit hooks?
evals.expected_output: Installs core dependencies, sets up both visualization backends (Matplotlib and DatoViz), configures pre-commit hooks, verifies setup with import tests.

evals.prompt: Set up the project for development. Make sure both visualization backends are available and ready to test.
evals.expected_output: Complete environment setup including dependency installation, backend configuration, structure verification, and import tests for both backends.

evals.prompt: I need to get the development environment working. Install everything needed and verify both Matplotlib and DatoViz backends work.
evals.expected_output: Full setup pipeline with dependency installation, backend setup, pre-commit configuration, and verification checklist showing all components working.
